calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-191 signal-state discriminability probe
items.note: Tests whether different internal functional states (wanting, nociception, frustration) produce discriminable output patterns. Queued via IGW-20260618-181 (EXP-0186 proposal).
